# Lệ Nông Thị | Full-stack Developer Portfolio

This is the portfolio of Lệ Nông Thị, a passionate software engineer specializing in backend systems and modern web technologies.

## Personal Information
- **Name**: Lệ Nông Thị
- **Role**: Full-stack Developer
- **Location**: Cat Lai Ward, Ho Chi Minh City
- **Email**: mikhailcolt@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: [vyle3696](https://linkedin.com/in/vyle3696)
- **GitHub**: [vyle3696](https://github.com/vyle3696)

## Professional Summary
Passionate software engineer with extensive experience in backend systems and modern web technologies. Bridging technical excellence with creative problem-solving.

## Core Skills
- **Frontend**: Vue.js, React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Laravel, PHP, RESTful API, GraphQL.
- **Database**: SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis.
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Git, AWS, Nginx, Linux.
- **Specialization**: Game Development, Full-Stack Development.

## Experience
- **Teanis Technologies** (Sep 2024 - Present): Full-stack Developer.
- **SugaGroup** (Aug 2018 - Aug 2024): Back End Developer.
- **HORICAL CO.,LTD** (July 2017 - Dec 2017): Frontend Developer.

## Education
- **University of Information Technology** (2014 - 2018): Engineer's Degree in Software Engineering.

## Project Structure
- **Framework**: Next.js 15+ (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Animations**: motion/react (Framer Motion)
- **Icons**: lucide-react
- **Multi-language**: Supported in English (en), Vietnamese (vn), and Japanese (jp).
- **SEO**: Implemented with dynamic metadata, sitemap, robots.txt, and JSON-LD structured data.

## Key Features
- Multi-language support with localized content.
- Dark/Light mode theme switching.
- Custom handwritten SVG logo.
- Responsive design with glassmorphism effects.
- Skill visualization with interactive modals.
- SEO optimized with structured data and metadata.
